name: How long do I have to file after slipping at work in Boise?
description: Report injury within 60 days in ID, file ASAP; 2 years for third-party suits.

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file after slipping at work in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report injury within 60 days in ID, file ASAP; 2 years for third-party suits.
acceptedAnswer.description: **In Idaho, report within 60 days and file workers' comp claim promptly; third-party suits have 2-year statute.** Delays risk claim denial as non-work-related.[1][5] Key factors: Utah gives 4 years for personal injury but workers' comp is faster. Immediate reporting strengthens causation proof. Insurance fights delayed claims. Track deadlines strictly. Hire an attorney to meet all filing requirements without missing windows.
